title: BiRAGAS · The Infrastructure for the Three Rights
subtitle: Every wrong target. Every wrong patient. Every wrong analysis. We fix all three.

slides.title: BiRAGAS
slides.subtitle: The Infrastructure for the Three Rights
slides.tag: Every wrong target. Every wrong patient. Every wrong analysis. We fix all three.
slides.narration: BiRAGAS. The first causal infrastructure built to solve the three deepest failures of modern drug discovery. The wrong target. The wrong patient. And the wrong analysis. We fix all three.

slides.title: Drug discovery has been failing in three places, for forty years.
slides.body: Pharma keeps building drugs against correlations, enrolling patients who can never respond, and analysing data with statistics that miss the mechanism. Every failure is one of those three.
slides.narration: For forty years, drug discovery has been failing in three places. Pharma keeps building drugs against correlations, enrolling patients who can never respond, and analyzing data with statistics that miss the mechanism. Every failure is one of those three.

slides.title: BiRAGAS in one sentence.
slides.body: Twenty-eight production modules. Three causal corrections. One auditable platform — from FASTQ to FDA-ready dossier.
slides.narration: BiRAGAS in one sentence. Twenty-eight production modules. Three causal corrections. One auditable platform that takes you from raw sequencing reads to an FDA-ready evidence dossier.

slides.title: The Three Wrongs

wrongs.label: WRONG TARGET
wrongs.desc: Chosen from correlations — never validated as causal.

wrongs.label: WRONG PATIENT
wrongs.desc: Stratified by averages that hide the actual responders.

wrongs.label: WRONG ANALYSIS
wrongs.desc: p-values that capture less than 30% of true causality.

slides.narration: Wrong one. Wrong target — chosen from correlations, never validated as causal. Wrong two. Wrong patient — stratified by averages that hide the responders. Wrong three. Wrong analysis — p-values that capture less than thirty percent of true causality. BiRAGAS replaces all three with mechanism.

slides.title: The first infrastructure that gets all three right.
slides.body: Not another correlation engine. Not another point tool. A complete causal platform — auditable, FDA-aligned, built from one disciplined pipeline.
slides.narration: BiRAGAS is the first infrastructure that gets all three right. Not another correlation engine. Not another point tool. A complete causal platform — auditable, FDA-aligned, and built from one disciplined pipeline.

slides.title: Chapter One
slides.subtitle: The Right Target — every time.
slides.narration: Chapter One. The right target, every time.

slides.title: 90% of clinical failures trace to the wrong target.
slides.body: The molecular target was never causally validated. It was chosen because it correlated with disease — not because changing it would change the disease.
slides.narration: Ninety percent of clinical-trial failures trace back to one thing — the molecular target was never causally validated. It was chosen because it correlated with disease, not because changing it would change the disease.

slides.title: The Correlation Trap
slides.body: Two genes can move together for a thousand reasons — shared regulation, shared exposure, shared confounders. Only one of those reasons is cause. Pharma has been spending billions chasing the other nine hundred and ninety-nine.
slides.narration: Two genes can move together for a thousand reasons. Shared regulation. Shared exposure. Shared confounders. Only one of those reasons is cause. Pharma has been spending billions chasing the other nine hundred and ninety-nine.

slides.title: $2.6B per approved drug · 14 years end-to-end · 90% attrition.
slides.body: Every dollar of that is a vote of confidence in a target chosen by correlation. The math has been wrong from the start.
slides.narration: The cost of getting the target wrong. Two point six billion dollars per approved drug. Fourteen years end to end. Ninety percent attrition. Every dollar is a vote of confidence in a target chosen by correlation.

slides.title: Causation, not correlation.
slides.body: BiRAGAS interrogates every candidate target with Pearl's causal calculus and a five-stream evidence stack before it ever leaves the platform.
slides.narration: BiRAGAS replaces correlation with causation — formally, mathematically, mechanistically. Every target candidate is interrogated by Pearl's causal calculus and a five-stream evidence stack before it ever leaves the platform.

slides.title: Pearl's Do-Calculus
slides.body: The mathematics of intervention, not just association. The framework answers the only question pharma needs answered — if I perturb this gene, will the disease change?
slides.narration: Pearl's do-calculus is the mathematical framework for reasoning about interventions, not just correlations. It answers the question pharma actually needs answered — if I perturb this gene, will the disease change? Every BiRAGAS target carries that answer.

slides.title: Causal Calculus and Edge Validation
slides.body: Every edge in the disease network is tested for directionality, confounding, and causal confidence. Edges that fail are stripped. The result is a validated causal DAG with every relationship defensible to a regulator.
slides.narration: Module one. Causal Calculus and Edge Validation. Every edge in the disease network is tested for directionality, confounding, and causal confidence. Edges that fail are stripped. The result is a validated causal DAG with every retained relationship defensible to a regulator.

slides.title: Causal DAG Construction
slides.body: Assemble a directed causal map of any disease from every available evidence stream — transcriptomic, genetic, perturbation, temporal, curated. One map. One source of truth. Every edge auditable.
slides.narration: Module two. The DAG Builder. Assemble a directed causal map of any disease from every available evidence stream — transcriptomic, genetic, perturbation, temporal, and curated. One map, one source of truth, every edge auditable.

slides.title: Mendelian Randomization
slides.body: Use genetic variants as nature's randomised trials to estimate the causal effect of gene expression on disease. The gold standard for causal anchoring, automated across thousands of genes.
slides.narration: Module three. Mendelian Randomization. Use genetic variants as nature's randomized trials to estimate the causal effect of gene expression on disease. This is the gold standard for causal anchoring, and BiRAGAS automates it across thousands of genes.

slides.title: GWAS Association Mapping
slides.body: Connect every candidate to disease- and tissue-specific GWAS evidence — eQTLs, sQTLs, GWAS Catalog hits — and prune anything genetics will not support.
slides.narration: Module four. GWAS Association Mapping. Connect every candidate gene to disease and tissue-specific genome-wide association evidence — eQTLs, sQTLs, GWAS Catalog hits — and prune anything that genetics will not support.

slides.title: SIGNOR Causal Pathway Analysis
slides.body: Trace every gene through the SIGNOR curated signalling network — the most rigorous causal pathway database in biology. Discover not just what is associated, but how it acts.
slides.narration: Module five. SIGNOR Causal Pathway Analysis. Trace every gene through the SIGNOR curated signalling network — the most rigorous causal pathway database in biology. Discover not just what is associated, but how it acts.

slides.title: Network Centrality & Target Tiering
slides.body: Score every gene by its position in the causal DAG. Tier it as Master Regulator, Secondary Driver, or Downstream Effector. Targets at the top of the cascade matter most.
slides.narration: Module six. Network Centrality. Score every gene by its position in the causal DAG and tier it as a Master Regulator, a Secondary Driver, or a Downstream Effector. Targets at the top of the cascade matter most. We tell you which is which.

slides.title: In-Silico Perturbation · Population
slides.body: Simulate what happens when you knock down, partially inhibit, or activate every candidate in the network. Rank by therapeutic potential. The wet lab tells you yes or no. We tell you which experiment to run first.
slides.narration: Module seven. In-Silico Perturbation, population scale. Simulate what happens when you knock down, partially inhibit, or activate every candidate gene in the network, then rank them by therapeutic potential. The wet lab tells you yes or no. We tell you which experiment to run first.

slides.title: Perturbation Analysis Suite
slides.body: A unified entry point combining CRISPR dependency screens, drug-perturbation transcriptomics, and connectivity-map evidence. Every candidate enters with one ID and leaves with five independent causal verdicts.
slides.narration: Module eight. The Perturbation Analysis Suite. A unified entry point combining CRISPR dependency screens, drug-perturbation transcriptomics, and connectivity-map evidence. Every candidate target enters with one ID and leaves with five independent causal verdicts.

slides.title: Targets backed by causation, not correlation.
slides.body: Every target that leaves BiRAGAS carries a Pearl-grade causal verdict, genetic anchoring, perturbation evidence, and a defensible mechanism. The wrong target problem ends here.
slides.narration: The consequence of Chapter One. Every target that leaves BiRAGAS carries a Pearl-grade causal verdict, genetic anchoring, perturbation evidence, and a defensible mechanism. The wrong target problem ends here.

slides.title: Chapter Two
slides.subtitle: The Right Patient — every time.
slides.narration: Chapter Two. The right patient, every time.

slides.title: Trials enrol non-responders. The signal dies in the average.
slides.body: Phase Two trials fail not because the drug doesn't work, but because the drug works only in a subset — and the trial enrolled everyone else along with them.
slides.narration: Phase Two trials fail not because the drug doesn't work, but because the drug works only in a subset — and the trial enrolled everyone else along with them. Average effects across mixed cohorts hide the responders. The signal dies in heterogeneity.

slides.title: 70%+ Phase II failure · molecular subgroups averaged away.
slides.body: Drugs that worked in a specific molecular subgroup were discarded because the trial averaged them out. Patients who could have responded were never told they qualified.
slides.narration: The cost of getting the patient wrong. Phase Two failure rates north of seventy percent. Drugs that worked in a specific molecular subgroup discarded because the trial averaged them away. Patients who could have responded never told they qualified.

slides.title: Patient-specific causality.
slides.body: BiRAGAS replaces population averages with per-patient mechanisms. Every patient gets their own re-personalised network, their own target ranking, their own responder verdict — before the trial enrols anyone.
slides.narration: BiRAGAS replaces population averages with patient-specific causality. Every patient gets their own re-personalised network, their own target ranking, their own responder verdict — before the trial enrolls anyone.

slides.title: Cohort & Data Retrieval
slides.body: A search engine for biological data — GEO, TCGA, dbGaP, ArrayExpress, single-cell atlases. Tell the assistant disease, tissue, cohort size; it pulls the matching evidence in one workflow.
slides.narration: Module nine. Cohort and Data Retrieval. A search engine for biological data — GEO, TCGA, dbGaP, ArrayExpress, single-cell atlases. Tell the assistant the disease, the tissue, the cohort size, and it pulls the matching evidence in one workflow.

slides.title: Data Harmonisation
slides.body: Make heterogeneous studies directly comparable. Standardise, validate, combine expression cohorts across platforms and laboratories. Without this, every downstream comparison is apples-to-oranges.
slides.narration: Module ten. Data Harmonisation. Make heterogeneous studies directly comparable. Standardise, validate, and combine expression cohorts across platforms and laboratories. Without this, every downstream comparison is an apples-to-oranges trap.

slides.title: Cell-Type Deconvolution
slides.body: Estimate the cellular composition behind every bulk RNA-seq sample — immune fractions, stromal context, fine-grained cell types. Three orthogonal algorithms. One harmonised answer.
slides.narration: Module eleven. Cell-Type Deconvolution. Estimate the cellular composition behind every bulk RNA-seq sample — immune fractions, stromal context, fine-grained cell types. Three orthogonal algorithms. One harmonised answer.

slides.title: Multi-Omics Integration
slides.body: Combine DNA, RNA, proteins, epigenetic marks, and metabolites from the same samples into one integrated biological view. The same gene means different things in different layers — we tell you which one to trust.
slides.narration: Module twelve. Multi-Omics Integration. Combine DNA, RNA, proteins, epigenetic marks, and metabolites from the same samples into one integrated biological view. The same gene means different things in different layers — we tell you which one to trust.

slides.title: Single-Cell RNA-seq Analysis
slides.body: Turn raw single-cell data into a biology-rich atlas — cell types annotated, markers ranked, pathways linked, trajectories inferred. Patient stratification at the resolution of one cell at a time.
slides.narration: Module thirteen. Single-Cell RNA-seq Analysis. Turn raw single-cell data into a biology-rich atlas — cell types annotated, markers ranked, pathways linked, trajectories inferred. Patient stratification at the resolution of one cell at a time.

slides.title: Multi-Disease Pathway Analysis
slides.body: Compare pathway alterations across multiple diseases or cohorts at once. Surface shared mechanisms. Detect disease-specific signatures. Find the cross-indication repositioning that one cohort alone never reveals.
slides.narration: Module fourteen. Multi-Disease Pathway Analysis. Compare pathway alterations across multiple diseases or cohorts at once. Surface shared mechanisms. Detect disease-specific signatures. Find the cross-indication repositioning opportunity that one cohort alone would never reveal.

slides.title: In-Silico Perturbation · Patient
slides.body: Re-run the perturbation simulation for every patient individually, using each patient's own expression profile. One drug, ten patients, ten different verdicts. Precision medicine made operational.
slides.narration: Module fifteen. In-Silico Perturbation, patient scale. Re-run the perturbation simulation for every patient individually, using their own expression profile to personalise the network. One drug, ten patients, ten different verdicts. This is precision medicine made operational.

slides.title: Temporal Analysis · Bulk Transcriptomics
slides.body: Recover the time direction hidden in any cohort — discover which genes, pathways, cell types follow impulse-shaped trajectories along disease progression. A static cohort, given dynamics.
slides.narration: Module sixteen. Temporal Analysis. Recover the time direction hidden in any cohort — discover which genes, pathways, and cell types follow impulse-shaped trajectories along disease progression. A static cohort, given dynamics.

slides.title: Temporal Granger Causality
slides.body: Reconstruct directed, time-resolved causal relationships from longitudinal expression data. Cause must precede effect. Granger makes that test rigorous and machine-checkable.
slides.narration: Module seventeen. Temporal Granger Causality. Reconstruct directed, time-resolved causal relationships from longitudinal expression data. Cause must precede effect. Granger makes that test rigorous and machine-checkable.

slides.title: Stratified cohorts. Mechanism-anchored responders.
slides.body: Every patient stratified by their own molecular biology. Every responder identified by mechanism. Every cohort enrolled around evidence — not averages. The wrong patient problem ends here.
slides.narration: The consequence of Chapter Two. Every patient is stratified by their own molecular biology, every responder identified by mechanism, every cohort enrolled around evidence — not averages. The wrong patient problem ends here.

slides.title: Chapter Three
slides.subtitle: The Right Analysis — every time.
slides.narration: Chapter Three. The right analysis, every time.

slides.title: p-values capture ≤ 30% of true causality.
slides.body: A significant p-value tells you the data is unlikely under chance. It does not tell you the variable is causal. Empirical reviews put p-values at less than thirty percent of true causal signal.
slides.narration: The third wrong. Outdated p-value-only statistics. A significant p-value tells you the data is unlikely under chance. It does not tell you the variable is causal. Empirical reviews put p-values at less than thirty percent of true causal signal.

slides.title: Reproducibility crisis · FDA pushback · retracted papers.
slides.body: Biomarker qualification submissions sent back for lack of mechanism. Investor money lost to statistically significant but causally hollow claims.
slides.narration: The cost of getting the analysis wrong. The reproducibility crisis. Retracted biomarker papers. FDA biomarker qualification submissions sent back for lack of mechanism. Investor money lost to statistically significant but causally hollow claims.

slides.title: Causal Confidence Score, not p-values alone.
slides.body: BiRAGAS replaces the p-value with a multi-evidence verdict — statistical significance, directionality, replication, perturbation, mechanism. Three tiers. Defensible to a regulator.
slides.narration: BiRAGAS replaces the p-value with a Causal Confidence Score — a multi-evidence verdict that combines statistical significance with directionality, replication, perturbation evidence, and mechanism. Three tiers. Defensible to a regulator.

slides.title: FASTQ Sequencing Pipeline
slides.body: Turn raw sequencing reads into clean, quantified, analysis-ready gene count matrices. Quality control. Adaptive trimming. Transcript quantification. Every reproducible analysis starts here.
slides.narration: Module eighteen. The FASTQ Pipeline. Turn raw sequencing reads into clean, quantified, analysis-ready gene count matrices. Quality control. Adaptive trimming. Transcript quantification. Every reproducible analysis starts here.

slides.title: Differential Expression Analysis
slides.body: Turn raw transcriptomic data into a statistically validated list of differentially expressed genes — across patient cohorts, treatment arms, and disease subtypes. Effect size, multiple-testing-corrected, mechanism-anchored.
slides.narration: Module nineteen. Differential Expression. Turn raw transcriptomic data into a statistically validated list of differentially expressed genes — across patient cohorts, treatment arms, and disease subtypes. Effect size, multiple-testing-corrected, mechanism-anchored.

slides.title: Total RNA & miRNA Analysis
slides.body: From raw transcript quantifications to a fully-interpreted transcriptome story — differential expression at gene and transcript level, isoform usage, non-coding RNAs. The complete picture, in one report.
slides.narration: Module twenty. Total RNA and miRNA Analysis. From raw transcript quantifications to a fully-interpreted transcriptome story — differential expression at gene and transcript level, isoform usage, non-coding RNAs. The complete picture, in one report.

slides.title: CRISPR Data Analysis
slides.body: A unified workspace from amplicon edit verification, to pooled screening hit discovery, to single-cell perturbation. CRISPR is the gold standard for causality — we make it production-grade.
slides.narration: Module twenty-one. CRISPR Data Analysis. A unified workspace from amplicon edit verification, to pooled screening hit discovery, to single-cell perturbation. CRISPR is the gold standard for causality — we make it production-grade.

slides.title: Targeted CRISPR Editing Analysis
slides.body: Validate every edit with publication-grade quantification of indel outcomes, on-target efficiency, and allele-level evidence. Every claim audit-ready.
slides.narration: Module twenty-two. Targeted CRISPR Editing Analysis. Validate every edit with publication-grade quantification of indel outcomes, on-target efficiency, and allele-level evidence. Every claim audit-ready.

slides.title: Pooled CRISPR Screening Analysis
slides.body: Turn pooled screens into statistically validated gene-level hit lists with essentiality scoring and DepMap-style prioritisation. The screen is the input. The mechanism-ranked target list is the output.
slides.narration: Module twenty-three. Pooled CRISPR Screening. Turn pooled screens into statistically validated gene-level hit lists with essentiality scoring and DepMap-style prioritisation. The screen is the input. The mechanism-ranked target list is the output.

slides.title: Perturb-seq · Single-Cell CRISPR Perturbation
slides.body: The most powerful target-validation engine in modern genomics — link CRISPR perturbations directly to single-cell transcriptomic states. Causal claims at the resolution of an individual cell.
slides.narration: Module twenty-four. Perturb-seq. The most powerful target-validation engine in modern genomics — link CRISPR perturbations directly to single-cell transcriptomic states. Causal claims at the resolution of an individual cell.

slides.title: DepMap Dependency & Essentiality Analysis
slides.body: Discover which genes a tumour truly needs to survive. Cross-reference candidates with the Broad Institute's dependency map across 1,800+ cancer models. Essentiality. Selectivity. Tractability.
slides.narration: Module twenty-five. DepMap Dependency Analysis. Discover which genes a tumour truly needs to survive. Cross-reference your candidates with the Broad Institute's dependency map across more than eighteen hundred cancer models. Essentiality. Selectivity. Tractability.

slides.title: Drug Repositioning · L1000 Connectivity Map
slides.body: Discover which drugs already in clinical use reverse the transcriptomic signature of your disease — at what dose, in which tissue. Repositioning is the fastest path from target to clinic.
slides.narration: Module twenty-six. Drug Repositioning with L1000. Discover which drugs already in clinical use reverse the transcriptomic signature of your disease — at what dose, in which tissue. Repositioning is the fastest path from target to clinic.

slides.title: Gene & Pathway Prioritisation
slides.body: Turn any gene list into a deduplicated, literature-anchored, clinically-relevant pathway ranking. Multiple databases. One consistent ranking. Always reproducible.
slides.narration: Module twenty-seven. Gene and Pathway Prioritisation. Turn any gene list into a deduplicated, literature-anchored, clinically-relevant pathway ranking. Multiple databases. One consistent ranking. Always reproducible.

slides.title: Report Generation
slides.body: Turn every analysis into a professional, shareable, publication-ready report — executive summaries, interactive dashboards, high-resolution figures. From notebook to investor deck in one click.
slides.narration: Module twenty-eight. Report Generation. Turn every analysis into a professional, shareable, publication-ready report — executive summaries, interactive dashboards, high-resolution figures. From notebook to investor deck in one click.

slides.title: Causality-grade evidence. FDA-aligned.
slides.body: Every analysis carries a Causal Confidence Score. Every claim a defensible mechanism. Every output an audit trail. The wrong analysis problem ends here.
slides.narration: The consequence of Chapter Three. Every analysis carries a Causal Confidence Score, every claim a defensible mechanism, every output an audit trail. The wrong analysis problem ends here.

slides.title: The Three Rights.

rights.label: RIGHT PATIENT
rights.desc: Stratified by mechanism, not by averages.

slides.narration: The three rights. Right target, validated by Pearl's causal calculus. Right patient, stratified by mechanism. Right analysis, anchored by Causal Confidence Score. Three corrections. One platform.

slides.title: Causion · The Natural-Language Agent.
slides.body: All twenty-eight modules sit behind one natural-language agent. Ask in plain English. Receive a source-linked, audit-grade answer. Complexity stays under the hood. Clarity ships to the regulator.
slides.narration: All twenty-eight modules sit behind one natural-language agent. Causion. Ask in plain English. Receive a source-linked, audit-grade answer. The complexity stays under the hood. The clarity ships to the regulator.

slides.title: FASTQ → FDA-Ready Dossier.
slides.body: Six disciplined steps. Source-linked at every claim. Auditable end to end.
slides.narration: From a raw FASTQ file to an FDA-ready evidence dossier. Six disciplined steps. Source-linked at every claim. Auditable end to end. This is what the regulators have been waiting for someone to build.

slides.title: The Ask.

items.v: Capital to scale infrastructure and grow the team.

slides.narration: The ask. Series A capital to scale infrastructure and grow the team. Pharma partnerships for target identification and patient stratification. Academic licensing for ongoing causal-AI research. Three doors. One platform.

slides.title: We are not building another AI.
slides.body: We are building the infrastructure that finally tells biology's actual story. Mechanism over correlation. Patient over average. Causation over coincidence. Three rights. One platform. One chance to do this properly.
slides.narration: We are not building another AI. We are building the infrastructure that finally tells biology's actual story. Mechanism over correlation. Patient over average. Causation over coincidence. Three rights, one platform, one chance to do this properly.
